## Outcome

Describe the patient, clinician-handoff, or system behavior improved by this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `node --check api/extract.js`

## Evidence

List the tests, synthetic fixtures, screenshots, or failure cases that demonstrate the change.

## Safety and privacy boundaries

- [ ] No identifiable patient information, production credentials, or live share secrets are included.
- [ ] Source provenance and patient-confirmation behavior are preserved.
- [ ] The change is not represented as diagnosis, treatment advice, or autonomous clinical review.
